results.matched_effect_cluster: FADE adaptive weight decay continual learning
results.justification: EXACT TWIN — adaptive per-parameter weight decay schedule for continual learning IS the time-decay-on-adapter mechanism in ULI-EPHEMERAL.
Null-space orthogonal init of LoRA adapter covers the null-space half of ULI-EPHEMERAL design.
OPLoRA orthogonal projection at base-weight gradient subspaces functionally equivalent to null-space projection.
LoRA-based unlearning is functionally identical effect class — graceful adapter removal.
Orthogonal subspace regularization covers the null-space-projection mechanism.
Decaying learning rate schedule for continual learning covers the schedule-driven graceful forgetting paradigm.

results.matched_effect_cluster: LoRA continual learning critical parameter constraint
results.justification: LoRA continual learning with critical parameter constraints covers the LoRA-graceful-forget design space.
Layer-wise hierarchical LoRA for continual learning covers the staged adapter-management paradigm.
